segments.name: Upstream Oil & Gas Operators
segments.description: Companies involved in exploration and production of oil and gas
segments.evidence_text: Primary applications for the low-power transmitter is in the upstream oil & gas industry. There, ABB transmitters are used to measure gauge pressure measurements on casing and tubing on well heads

segments.name: Onshore, Offshore and Subsea Oil & Gas Operators
segments.description: Operators managing oil and gas extraction and production in onshore, offshore, and subsea environments requiring explosion-proof and intrinsically safe pressure transmitters
segments.evidence_text: STS designs and manufactures a variety of pressure transmitters and transducers for oil and gas applications, including onshore, offshore and subsea. Our sensors are certified both explosion-proof and intrinsically safe, providing the required precision and long-term stability in these challenging environments.

segments.name: Midstream Pipeline and Storage Operators
segments.description: Companies involved in transportation, storage, and processing of hydrocarbons from upstream facilities to refineries or distribution centers, requiring flow and pressure measurement for pipeline monitoring, tanker loading/unloading, and storage tank management
segments.evidence_text: In the oil and gas industry, midstream operations encompass the transportation, storage, and processing of extracted hydrocarbons from upstream facilities to refineries or distribution centers. One primary application of flow measurement in midstream operations is Pipeline Monitoring. Accurate measurement of flow rates within pipelines is essential for maintaining operational efficiency, detecting leaks or irregularities, and ensuring the integrity of the transportation system.

segment_mappings.reason: Suitable for exploration and production environments due to its wide pressure range (-0.5 to 14 MPa / -71 to 2000 psi), high accuracy (±0.04% of span)
